statements.sql: select * from `admins` where `id` = 1 limit 1
select * from `admin_has_roles` where `admin_has_roles`.`admin_id` in (1)
select * from `admin_roles` where `admin_roles`.`id` in (1)
select * from `admin_role_permissions` where `admin_role_permissions`.`admin_role_id` in (1)
select * from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'adcrypto' and table_name = 'script' and table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
select exists(select * from `script`) as `exists`
select * from `languages` where `status` = 1 limit 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `users`
select count(*) as aggregate from `users` where `email_verified` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `users` where `status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `users` where `status` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `support_tickets`
select count(*) as aggregate from `support_tickets` where `status` = 2
select count(*) as aggregate from `support_tickets` where `status` = 3
select count(*) as aggregate from `blog_categories`
select count(*) as aggregate from `blog_categories`
select count(*) as aggregate from `blog_categories` where `status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `blog_categories` where `status` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `blogs`
select count(*) as aggregate from `blogs`
select count(*) as aggregate from `blogs` where `status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `blogs` where `status` = 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions`
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions` where `status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions` where `status` = 2
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto'
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto' and `status` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto' and `status` = 2
select sum(`total_charge`) as aggregate from `transactions`
select sum(`total_charge`) as aggregate from `transactions` where date(`created_at`) >= '2025-07-01' and date(`created_at`) <= '2025-07-21'
select sum(`total_charge`) as aggregate from `transactions` where date(`created_at`) >= '2025-06-01' and date(`created_at`) <= '2025-06-31'
select YEAR(created_at) as year, MONTH(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto' group by `year`, `month` order by `year` asc, `month` asc
select YEAR(created_at) as year, MONTH(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total from `transactions` where `type` = 'Sell Crypto' group by `year`, `month` order by `year` asc, `month` asc
select YEAR(created_at) as year, MONTH(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total from `transactions` where `type` = 'Withdraw Crypto' group by `year`, `month` order by `year` asc, `month` asc
select YEAR(created_at) as year, MONTH(created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as total from `transactions` where `type` = 'Exchange Crypto' group by `year`, `month` order by `year` asc, `month` asc
select * from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto' order by `id` desc, `created_at` desc limit 3
select * from `users`
select * from `support_tickets`
select * from `blog_categories`
select * from `blogs`
select * from `transactions`
select * from `transactions` where `type` = 'Buy Crypto'
select * from `admin_notifications` where `admin_id` != 1 and `type` in ('SIDE_NAV')
select * from `admin_notifications` where `admin_id` != 1 and `type` in ('SIDE_NAV')
